title: Everyone should know SIMD
summary: 本文介绍了SIMD（单指令多数据）技术，强调其作为并行处理的一种形式，能显著提升性能。作者通过具体例子展示了SIMD在字符串处理、数据压缩等场景的应用，并指出掌握SIMD对程序员的重要性。
summary_en: This article introduces SIMD (Single Instruction, Multiple Data) technology, emphasizing its role as a form of parallel processing that can significantly boost performance. The author demonstrates SIMD applications in string processing, data compression, and other scenarios, highlighting its importance for programmers.
